title: India's central bank revives push to isolate banks from crypto: Report
snippet: The Indian central bank reportedly urged lawmakers to keep banks insulated from crypto and private stablecoins while preserving room for regulated tokenization.

title: Ondo tokenizes BlackRock’s IVV ETF and Micron stock under US custodial model
snippet: Ondo Finance launches tokenized BlackRock IVV ETF and Micron shares under SEC-defined custodial model with Ethereum-based settlement.

title: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
snippet: More than 130 Tron wallets connected with a Central Asian ISIS affiliate were sanctioned by the U.S. government, with funds frozen by Tether.

title: Ondo Finance launches custodial tokenised securities in the US
snippet: Ondo Finance today announced the first live solution of third-party tokenized U.S. securities operating entirely within the existing regulatory perimeter in the U.S., in partnership with Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc., (NYSE: BR) to provide full voting rights for tokenized equity holders.

snippet: Standard Chartered is the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutions mint and redeem Circle's USDC.

title: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
snippet: While engaged in negotiations over ethics in a crypto market structure bill in Congress, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said she had “no involvement” in her son’s derivatives exchange, backed by at least one industry figure.

title: Bitget expands Stock+ platform with US stock options trading
snippet: Bitget launched U.S. stock options, adding equity derivatives to its Stock+ platform alongside crypto and tokenized stocks.

title: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
snippet: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.

title: Tokenization could make finance faster, but also more susceptible to shocks, IMF says
IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
snippet: The global lender says blockchain-based finance could streamline markets but warns that fragmented standards and regulations may create new systemic risks.
